description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single-cutaway design, finished in a glossy black color. The body is contoured and features a flat top with a visible pickguard and two control knobs. The neck is straight and slender, with a dark fingerboard and dot inlays, leading up to a headstock with six inline tuning pegs. The bridge is a fixed type, and the guitar is equipped with two single-coil pickups, one near the bridge and one near the neck. The back of the guitar is plain, with no visible electronics cavity or battery compartment. The overall construction suggests a modern, robust instrument suitable for urban street performances or studio use.
description: A glossy black, single-cutaway electric guitar with two single-coil pickups, a flat top, and a sleek, contoured body. It features a dark fingerboard, six inline tuners, and a fixed bridge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, pickguard, two single-coil pickups, control knobs, and the full neck with dot inlays.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim, solid body and the straight neck extending from the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain black back of the guitar and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the thinness of the body and the neck's alignment.
attribute_headstock_design: Six inline tuning pegs, flat top, no visible logo, standard Telecaster-style shape
